meta.sourceOfTruth: Inventory master for vendor Eventeny sync and zone Partnerships quotes

vendors.name: Food truck / trailer
vendors.publicDescription: Licensed mobile food unit on wheels — vehicle access to the north truck row. Self-contained power on truck/trailer typical.

lineItems.titleTemplate: Food Truck / Trailer Early Bird – Sat Sep 26 – ${amount}
Food Truck / Trailer Late – Sat Sep 26 – ${amount}

vendors.name: Open cooking
vendors.publicDescription: Cook line under tenant tent on a deep pad — foot load-in only, no vehicle in cook area. Portable generator behind cook line with rear setback.

lineItems.titleTemplate: Open Cooking (10×30 deep pad) – Sat Sep 26 – ${amount}
Open Cooking Early Bird – Sat Sep 26 – ${amount}

vendors.name: Beverage anchor
vendors.publicDescription: Live-prep drink anchor — boba, sugarcane, aguas, coffee. Pick canopy, truck, or trailer on follow-up.

setupQuestion.prompt: How will you set up on site?

lineItems.titleTemplate: Beverage Anchor Early Bird – Sat Sep 26 – ${amount}

vendors.name: Snack / treat booth
vendors.publicDescription: Walk-around treats — jerky, candy, popcorn, shaved ice. Prepack booth; no meal or drink anchor.
requirements: County health compliance for prepack sales

lineItems.titleTemplate: Snack / Treat Early Bird – Sat Sep 26 – ${amount}

vendors.name: Sealed food retail
vendors.publicDescription: Take-home sealed food — mooncake boxes, frozen packs, jars. TFF PRE-PKG when applicable.

lineItems.titleTemplate: Sealed Food Retail Early Bird – Sat Sep 26 – ${amount}
Sealed Food Retail Late – Sat Sep 26 – ${amount}

vendors.name: General exhibitor
vendors.publicDescription: Retail, services, or tabling in the flex vendor ring.
requirements: No open flame without separate vendor path

lineItems.titleTemplate: General Exhibitor Early Bird – Sat Sep 26 – ${amount}

vendors.name: Nonprofit
vendors.publicDescription: 501(c) or equivalent nonprofit tabling — mission-first, not primary commerce.

retiredSkus.note: Legacy prepackaged food — split by vendor_class

zoneBaselines.name: Small custom zone
included: Plaza in front of your spot row
zoneBaselines.publicDescription: Three adjacent spots plus a front plaza — an intimate named corner. Bring popup shade or add frame tent rental.

amenities.shade: BYO popups OK or MAF-ADD-TENT-10X10 (Capitol frame tent)
amenities.power: Shared festival power tower · MAF-ADD-GEN-PORTABLE optional

zoneBaselines.name: Medium custom zone
included: Plaza in front of your spot row
zoneBaselines.publicDescription: Five adjacent spots plus plaza — family home base or program block.

amenities.shade: BYO popups OK or MAF-ADD-TENT-10X10 (Capitol frame tent)
amenities.power: Shared festival power tower · MAF-ADD-GEN-PORTABLE optional

zoneBaselines.name: Large custom zone
included: Plaza in front of your spot row
zoneBaselines.publicDescription: Eight adjacent spots plus plaza — village-scale identity with room for welcome arch, crafts, and linger area.

amenities.shade: BYO popups OK or MAF-ADD-TENT-10X10 (Capitol frame tent)
amenities.power: Shared festival power tower · MAF-ADD-GEN-PORTABLE optional

hosted.name: Children's Village anchor station
hosted.publicDescription: Coalition-programmed anchor in Children's Village meetup corral — not a public tenant rental. Parent networks and PTAs → small activation zone with name on map.

packageTemplates.name: Corner activation
packageTemplates.description: Intimate mini-festival — three adjacent spots; BYO shade and volunteers, coalition holds the crowd.

packageTemplates.name: Village activation
packageTemplates.description: Family home base — crafts, photo, identity signage. Medium or large baseline.

packageTemplates.name: Program block
packageTemplates.description: Stage-adjacent microstage — coalition sets up PA + plaza seating; you bring performers.

addons.name: 10×10 frame tent rental
addons.publicDescription: Capitol Tent City frame tent + weights — sturdy 10×10 suitable for festival rigging (not popup canopy).

addons.name: Portable generator + fuel
addons.publicDescription: Zone power beyond shared festival tower — Power & Lighting sign-off.

addons.name: Zone lighting
addons.publicDescription: Dusk zone lighting — installed and struck by festival staff. Rigged to Capitol frame tent(s), festival pole kit, or ground uplights — not tenant popups.

addons.name: Lighting pole kit
addons.publicDescription: Weighted poles at plaza edge for string lighting when you BYO popup shade — pairs with zone lighting add-on.

addons.name: Tables & chairs
addons.publicDescription: Table and chair rental for your zone — popular with parent groups who don't want to haul gear from the parking lot.

addons.name: Zone signage
addons.publicDescription: Map legend + A-frames so families find your block.

addons.name: Welcome banner
addons.publicDescription: Entrance banner with your artwork — e.g. Welcome to Little Manila.

addons.name: Photo backdrop
addons.publicDescription: Step-and-repeat structure + mount — festival installs; you supply print art.

addons.name: Zone sound / microstage
addons.publicDescription: Portable PA + line-in on one spot — you bring performers and run-of-show.

addons.name: Microstage plaza seating
addons.publicDescription: Chair ring in the plaza facing your microstage pad (~24 seats).

addons.name: Lantern craft activity
addons.publicDescription: Make a lantern before procession — supplies + runbook.

addons.name: Photo booth activity
addons.publicDescription: Family photos at your backdrop — best with the photo backdrop in your zone.

addons.name: Group game
addons.publicDescription: Short festival game — scavenger, relay, or similar.

addons.name: Facilitator slot
addons.publicDescription: Festival volunteer runs a 30-minute activity window in your zone.
